text: Welcome to the 247HRM Helpdesk Agent Handbook.
ttsText: Welcome to the Twenty four seven H R M Helpdesk Agent Handbook.

text: In ninety seconds, we'll log you in and tour the screen.
ttsText: In ninety seconds, we'll log you in and tour the screen.

text: Login is passwordless. Just your work email and a one-time code.
ttsText: Login is passwordless. Just your work email and a one-time code.

text: Check your email — a six-digit code arrives in seconds.
ttsText: Check your email — a six-digit code arrives in seconds.

text: Three regions repeat across every screen.
ttsText: Three regions repeat across every screen.

text: Top — the global bar. Timezone, notifications, your role.
ttsText: Top — the global bar. Timezone, notifications, your role.

text: Left — the sidenav. Each link is a module you have access to.
ttsText: Left — the sidenav. Each link is a module you have access to.

text: And the main area, which changes as you navigate.
ttsText: And the main area, which changes as you navigate.

text: Most days you'll spend in Tickets.
ttsText: Most days you'll spend in Tickets.

text: Six counters at the top show today's pulse.
ttsText: Six counters at the top show today's pulse.
